creator: frank@fthieme.net
text:
I try to boot the amd64 CD 1 or livecd and last think I see is:

"Probing devices, please wait" and fails with 
/: write failed, file system is full
panic: going nowhere without my init!

After that the machine is frozen and I just can switch off.

How-To-Repeat: insert CD, start system and just wait
